title: polygala amara subsp. carniolica
intro: Polygala amara subsp. carniolica, also known as the Alpine Milkwort, is a plant species belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Polygala amara subsp. carniolica include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions, as well as its potential in treating digestive issues and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant, often in the form of tea or infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
